headline: ₹500-700 Cr at risk — IDFC First Bank hit by ₹590 Cr fraud, triggering governance crisis and regulatory scrutiny
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, COSO ERM, ESRS; SEBI scrutiny and possible trading restrictions; risk of penalties.
P/E compression expected; margin erosion from provisioning; ₹590 Cr revenue at risk.
Cost of capital likely to rise by 20-40bps; risk of ESG fund outflows and higher bond spreads.
action: Immediate board-level intervention and public disclosure required to contain financial and reputational fallout.
Opportunity: First-mover advantage in governance reform and transparent disclosure
